package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_hot_path_optimization_invariant_parse_inside_handler: Layer: Hot path optimization. Flag handlers that parse invariant templates, schemas, or expressions per request.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule546PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario546Positive(records []Rule546PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
